mapper.select: SELECT p.*, u.username as seller_username, u.phone as seller_phone FROM products p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.seller_student_id = u.student_id WHERE p.product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products (product_id, seller_student_id, category, product_name, `condition`, price, description, image_url, status) VALUES (#{productId}, #{sellerStudentId}, #{category}, #{productName}, #{condition}, #{price}, #{description}, #{imageUrl}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, u.username as seller_username, u.phone as seller_phone FROM products p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.seller_student_id = u.student_id WHERE p.seller_student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY p.publish_date DESC
SELECT p.*, u.username as seller_username, u.phone as seller_phone FROM products p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.seller_student_id = u.student_id ORDER BY p.publish_date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET status = #{status} WHERE product_id = #{productId}
